texts.account_banned_message: Your account has been banned! Reason: {reason} Your trust points have been reset. If you believe this is a mistake, please contact support.
texts.active_subscription_guard:
You already have an active subscription.

New order is currently unavailable.
texts.admin_only_command: This command is only available to administrators.
texts.admin_only_feature: This feature is only available to administrators.
texts.admin_ref_notice: Referral system is not available for administrators.
texts.admin_step_not_required: This step is not required for administrators.
texts.admin_subscription_info: Your VPN subscription Plan: Admin Remaining traffic: Unlimited IP addresses: Unlimited Validity period: Unlimited Connection URL: {url} JSON URL for connection: {json_url}
texts.admin_welcome: Welcome, administrator! Total users: {total_users} Active VPNs: {active_vpns} Banned users: {banned_users}
texts.ban_reason_prompt: Enter the reason for banning user {user_id}.
texts.ban_user_prompt: Enter the ID of the user to ban.
texts.broadcast_completed: Broadcast to group {type_text} completed. Sent: {sent_count} Errors: {failed_count}
texts.broadcast_message_must_be_text: Notification must be a text message.
texts.broadcast_message_prompt: Enter the notification text for the group: {type_text}.
texts.broadcast_prompt: Choose who to send the notification to.
texts.buy_admin_custom_hint: Test connections without payment are available for administrators.
texts.buy_custom_button_hint: Custom plan is available via a separate button below the list.
texts.buy_unavailable: Buy VPN subscription Fixed plans are temporarily unavailable.
texts.buy_user_payment_hint: After selecting a plan, offer agreement and payment step will open.
texts.catalog_payment_details: Buy VPN plan You have selected the {plan_name} plan for {price_line}. {locations_line}{total_line}To pay, transfer {amount} RUB to card number: {payment_card}. After payment, click the button below to confirm the payment.
texts.client_setup_guide: Recommendations for using our VPN! Best client: INCY ⚙️ Settings: Open 📥 Download client: Open 💡 Note: for INCY we recommend using a JSON subscription
texts.compensate_positive_days: Number of days must be greater than zero.
texts.custom_plan_invalid_locations: Invalid location list for custom plan
texts.custom_plan_limits_out_of_range: Custom plan parameters out of allowed range
texts.custom_payment_request_received: Payment confirmation request for custom plan received. After payment verification, you will receive a notification about your subscription status.
texts.custom_tariff_admin_test_hint: For administrators, the custom plan is created in test mode, without payment confirmation.
texts.custom_tariff_build_failed: Failed to create custom plan. Start over.
texts.custom_tariff_info_formula: Formula: total = {base} + GB × {gb_coef} + IP × D × {ip_day_coef} + ΣLOC × D
texts.custom_tariff_invalid_duration: Enter an integer for the subscription period.
texts.custom_tariff_invalid_duration_range: Subscription period must be in the range {min_days}-{max_days} days.
texts.custom_tariff_invalid_gb: Enter an integer for traffic volume in GB.
texts.custom_tariff_invalid_gb_range: Traffic volume must be in the range {min_gb}-{max_gb} GB.
texts.custom_tariff_invalid_ip: Enter an integer for the IP limit.
texts.custom_tariff_invalid_ip_range: IP limit must be in the range {min_ip}-{max_ip}.
texts.custom_tariff_invalid_limits: Custom plan parameters out of allowed range. Start over.
texts.custom_tariff_locations_text: Custom plan Step 4/4: select one or more locations. Selected: {selected_text}
texts.custom_tariff_payment_details: Custom plan payment Plan: {plan_name} Locations: {servers} Amount to pay: {amount} RUB Transfer {amount} RUB to card number: {payment_card}. After transfer, click the confirmation button.
texts.custom_tariff_payment_prepare_failed: Failed to prepare payment. Create custom plan again.
texts.custom_tariff_select_locations: Select locations using the buttons below or cancel the action.
texts.custom_tariff_step_days: Custom plan Step 3/4: enter the subscription period in days. Range: {min_days}-{max_days} days.
texts.custom_tariff_step_gb: Custom plan Step 1/4: enter traffic volume in GB. Range: {min_gb}-{max_gb} GB.
texts.custom_tariff_step_ip: Custom plan Step 2/4: enter the IP limit. Range: {min_ip}-{max_ip}.
texts.custom_tariff_summary: Custom plan Parameters: • Traffic: {traffic_gb} GB • Devices: {ip_limit} • Period: {duration} • Locations: {servers} (+{location_daily_total} RUB/day) Formula: {formula} Price without discount: {base_total} RUB {price_line}{next_step_text}
texts.custom_tariff_summary_discount: Trust score discount: -{discount_percent}% Final price: {final_price} RUB
texts.custom_tariff_unavailable_locations: Custom plan is temporarily unavailable: locations not configured.
texts.custom_tariff_use_buttons_or_cancel: Use the buttons below or cancel the action.
texts.custom_tariff_user_payment_hint: Next, offer agreement will open, followed by payment details.
texts.custom_test_subscription_created: Test subscription created Plan: {plan_name} Devices: up to {ip_limit} Traffic: {traffic} Locations: {servers} Period: {duration} Connection URL: {vpn_url}
texts.delete_subscription_confirm: Confirm deletion of subscription for user {user_id}. Enter 'YES' to confirm or 'cancel' to cancel.
texts.delete_subscription_confirm_prompt: Enter the ID of the user whose subscription you want to delete.
texts.delete_subscription_fail: Failed to delete subscription for user {user_id} (maybe it doesn't exist).
texts.invalid_days_number: Please enter a valid numeric value.
texts.invalid_user_id_number: Please enter a valid numeric user ID.
texts.language_decorative_notice: Administrator language selection panel is decorative. Returning to main screen.
texts.language_prompt: Select language for working with the bot.
texts.no_active_subscription: You do not have an active subscription yet.
texts.normalize_all_complete: Normalization completed Iterations: {iterations} Expired deleted: {expired_cleaned} Traffic exceeded deleted: {traffic_exceeded} Missing recovered: {missing_recovered} Servers normalized: {servers_normalized} Subscriptions updated: {subscriptions_updated} Errors: {errors}
texts.normalize_all_failed: Normalization not completed Iterations: {iterations} Errors: {errors} Panel problems: {panel_errors} Manual intervention required.
texts.normalize_subscriptions_ok: Normalization completed No problems found, everything is fine.
texts.normalize_subscriptions_report: Subscription normalization report Expired deleted: {expired_cleaned} Traffic exceeded deleted: {traffic_exceeded_cleaned} Missing recovered: {missing_recovered} Errors: {errors}
texts.offer_agreement: Offer agreement Before payment, confirm that you have read the public offer and accept its terms.
texts.p2p_payment_details: Payment by card transfer Plan: {plan_name} Amount to pay: {amount} RUB Transfer {amount} RUB to card number: {payment_card}. After transfer, click the button below to confirm the payment.
texts.payment_accepted_notification: Your payment has been confirmed! Plan: {plan_name} IP addresses: up to {ip_limit} Traffic: {traffic} Locations: {servers} Period: {duration}{bonus_text} {trust_change_line} Connection URL: {vpn_url} Thank you for your purchase!
texts.payment_claim_unavailable: Payment not found, already processed, or currently being processed by another administrator.
texts.payment_finalize_changed: Failed to complete payment processing: its status has already changed.
texts.payment_processed_warning: Payment has been processed, but a warning occurred. Check payment status.
texts.payment_processing_error: Payment processing error. Please try again.
texts.payment_rejected_notification: Your payment has been rejected! Please check: 1. Correct payment amount 2. Card data validity 3. Successful transfer in banking app {trust_change_line} If you are sure you did everything correctly, please contact support.
texts.payment_request_already_exists:
You already have a payment confirmation request.

Please wait for administrator verification.
texts.payment_request_received: Payment confirmation request received. After payment verification, you will receive a notification about your subscription status.
texts.plan_not_found_during_payment: Plan not found during payment confirmation
texts.rate_limit: Please wait {remaining} seconds and try again.
texts.referral_bonus_create_failed_admin: Failed to issue free subscription to referrer {referrer_id}. Bonus saved.
texts.referral_bonus_days_added: You have been credited {bonus_days} days through the referral program!
texts.referral_bonus_extend_failed_admin: Failed to extend referrer {referrer_id}'s subscription. {bonus_days} day bonus pending.
texts.referral_bonus_no_plan_admin: No available plans to issue bonus to referrer {referrer_id}. Bonus saved.
texts.referral_bonus_subscription_created: You have been issued a free subscription for {bonus_days} days through the referral program! URL: {vpn_url}
texts.referral_info: Referral system Your link: {link} Total invited: {total_refs} Paid invites: {paid_refs} Bonus for a paying friend: +{bonus_days} days
texts.state_error: State error. Start the action again.
texts.subscription_active_details: Your subscription is active Plan: {plan_text} {traffic_line}IP addresses: up to {ip_limit} Locations: {servers} Valid until: {expiry_date} Trust points: {trust_score} Discount: {discount_percent}% Connection URL: {sub_url}
texts.subscription_cleanup_expired: Subscription period has expired. Your subscription has been deleted. Buy a new subscription or contact support. {trust_line}
texts.subscription_cleanup_inactive: Subscription is no longer active. Your subscription has been deleted. Buy a new subscription or contact support. {trust_line}
texts.subscription_cleanup_traffic_exhausted: Traffic package has been exhausted. Your subscription has been deleted. Buy a new subscription or contact support. {trust_line}
texts.subscription_expiring_soon: Your subscription expires soon Current plan: {plan_text} Remaining: {days_left} To renew the plan, pay for a new plan and the saved URL will be automatically extended.
texts.subscription_inactive_details: Subscription inactive Last plan: {plan_text} IP addresses: up to {ip_limit} Traffic: {traffic} Locations: {servers} Trust points: {trust_score} Discount: {discount_percent}% Last URL: {sub_url}
texts.tariffs_footer: The list of countries and servers will be expanded.
texts.tariffs_unavailable: VPN plans Fixed plans are temporarily unavailable.
texts.tech_work_compensate_complete: Compensation applied • Days added: {days} • Users processed: {processed} • Errors: {errors}
texts.tech_work_compensate_prompt: Enter the number of days to compensate all users (e.g., 7).
texts.tech_work_disabled_normalizing: Maintenance mode disabled • Users notified: {notified} Automatic subscription normalization started...
texts.tech_work_enabled: Maintenance mode enabled • Users notified: {notified} • Subscriptions disconnected: {disconnected}
texts.tech_work_ended: Maintenance completed! The service is back to normal. All subscriptions are being restored.
texts.tech_work_in_progress: Maintenance in progress! We are updating the service to make it better. Please try again later.
texts.tech_work_started: Maintenance started! All subscriptions are temporarily disabled. We are working on improving the service. Thank you for your patience!
texts.test_subscription_created: Test subscription successfully created! Plan: {plan_name} IP addresses: up to {ip_limit} Traffic: {traffic} Locations: {servers} Period: {duration} Connection URL: {vpn_url}
texts.trial_admin_not_allowed: Trial plan is not available to administrators.
texts.trial_plan_not_found: Trial plan not found or unavailable.
texts.trial_subscription_created: Trial subscription created! Plan: {plan_name} IP addresses: up to {ip_limit} Traffic: {traffic} Locations: {servers} Period: {duration} Connection URL: {vpn_url}
texts.trial_used_or_has_subscription: Trial plan has already been used or you already have a subscription.
texts.trust_add_prompt: Enter the ID of the user to add trust to.
texts.trust_amount_positive: Amount must be greater than zero.
texts.trust_amount_prompt: Enter the amount to {action_text} trust to user {user_id}.
texts.trust_operation_negative_balance: Operation impossible: current balance {current_score}, cannot go below zero.
texts.trust_remove_prompt: Enter the ID of the user to remove trust from.
texts.trust_update_success: Trust for user {user_id} successfully {action_text}. Balance: {current_score} → {final_score} (change {delta}). Discount: {discount}%.
texts.unban_reason_prompt: Enter the reason for unbanning user {user_id}.
texts.unban_user_prompt: Enter the ID of the user to unban.

texts.user_unban_notification:
Your account has been unbanned.

Reason: {reason}
